mapper.select: SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, customer.company_name AS customerName, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, CONCAT(o.receiver_province, o.receiver_city, o.receiver_district, o.receiver_address) AS receiverAddress, o.goods_amount AS goodsAmount, o.freight_amount AS freightAmount, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, customer.company_name AS customerName, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, CONCAT(o.receiver_province, o.receiver_city, o.receiver_district, o.receiver_address) AS receiverAddress, o.goods_amount AS goodsAmount, o.freight_amount AS freightAmount, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT o.order_no FROM order_info o JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = o.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND customer.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1

SELECT o.order_no FROM order_info o JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = o.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.id = #{orderId} AND merchant.member_id = ( SELECT u.member_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1
